# Supplier Comparison Report

**Project Name:** Downtown Water Main Replacement Phase III
**Comparison Date:** 2024-03-15
**RFQ Reference:** RFQ-2024-0312
**Evaluation Criteria:** Price (40%), Lead Time (25%), Quality/Compliance (20%), Payment Terms (15%)
**Recommended Supplier:** Premium Pipe Solutions Inc.

## Supplier Evaluation

| Supplier | Item Description | Unit Price | Total Price | Lead Time | Payment Terms | Delivery Terms | Warranty | Compliance | Score |
|----------|-----------------|-----------|-------------|-----------|---------------|----------------|----------|------------|-------|
| Premium Pipe Solutions Inc. | 12-inch DI Water Main | $160/ft | $384,000 | 45 days | 50/50 | FOB Destination | 10 years | ISO 9001 Certified | 92/100 |
| National Waterworks Corp. | 12-inch DI Water Main | $155/ft | $372,000 | 60 days | Net 60 | FOB Origin | 5 years | AWWA Compliant | 78/100 |
| Atlas Pipeline Group | 12-inch DI Water Main | $170/ft | $408,000 | 30 days | Net 30 | FOB Destination | 10 years | ISO 9001 + AWWA | 85/100 |

**Notes:** Premium Pipe selected despite slightly higher unit price due to superior warranty, compliance, and balanced payment structure.
